name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.StaggerFallHelper.RampTimeFromStartValues
summary: Time spent ramping from Start to end values for arms and spine stiffness and damping i.e. for whiplash effect (occurs after timeAtStartValues).
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 2.0f.
